_readme: External tool dependencies. Nothing under vendor/ except this manifest, bootstrap.py, and .gitignore is committed — installs live in gitignored subdirectories. Resolve or install via: python vendor/bootstrap.py <name> [--install]

blender.purpose: atelier 3D backend — sculpt (metaballs/mesh), stage (constraints), frame (camera), G-buffer (passes/Cryptomatte/AOVs). Driven headless: blender --background --python <script>

mpfb.purpose: MakeHuman Plugin For Blender — parametric rigged human bodies from code (GPL-3.0, official Blender extension). Loaded in-session by atelier scene scripts; the figure evolution beyond hand-placed primitives.
mpfb._note: loaded by scene scripts via bpy script_directories + addon_utils.enable('mpfb'); extension_path_user is patched to a vendored userhome (see projects/byrne/mpfb_probe.py)

mh_assets.purpose: MakeHuman community system asset pack (CC0) — the wardrobe: clothes, hair, skins, eyes, eyebrows, teeth, proxymeshes. Consumed by MPFB figures (projects/byrne/mpfb_body.py resolves vendor/mh_assets).
